codeReview.evidence: Reviewed changed validator, type contract, and tests; no blocking code-quality issues remain.

manualQa.evidence: Executed CLI, HTTP, browser screenshot, and data-diff validation scenarios with artifact-backed outcomes.

adversarialCases.scenario: malformed gate input omits manual QA evidence
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: validator rejects the gate with ULW_LOOP_QUALITY_GATE_INVALID

adversarialCases.scenario: legacy ledger entry contains an old quality gate object
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: ledger remains readable because qualityGate is stored as unknown

artifactRefs.description: CLI transcript for valid quality gate acceptance.
Log proving malformed quality gate rejection.
HTTP dump for quality gate endpoint validation.
Browser screenshot captured for the quality gate scenario.

gateReview.evidence: Rechecked reviewer reports, manual QA artifacts, and criteria coverage; gate is approved.

iteration.evidence: Full focused rerun passed after validator update.

criteriaCoverage.originalIntent: User wanted the final quality gate to accept only artifact-backed completion.
criteriaCoverage.desiredOutcome: The validator rejects weak gates and stores a complete, review-backed approval record.
criteriaCoverage.userOutcomeReview: From the user's perspective, every intended outcome is covered by evidence and review artifacts.
